name: disseminate
description: Dissemination planner (workflow plane): turn provenanced work into published, linked products. publish pushes to a sibling; dataset-release cuts a citable versioned release (DOI via the archive doer); link-outputs cross-links products (DataCite); draft-manuscript + reporting-checklist produce the paper; executable-article (NeuroLibre), agent-bundle (Paper2Agent), and liab-deploy (Lab-in-a-Box) produce the living compendium. Delegates DataLad mechanics to the datalad doer.
